'''âsh-v-h''' ('''kashavah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:easter|easter]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-v-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:easter|easter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-v-h
|-
! Lemma
| kashavah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishavah|thishavah]] || [[word:jishavah|jishavah]] || [[word:shishavah|shishavah]] || [[word:kishavah|kishavah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushavah|thuthushavah]] || [[word:jujushavah|jujushavah]] || [[word:shushushavah|shushushavah]] || [[word:kukushavah|kukushavah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushavah|thushavah]] || [[word:jushavah|jushavah]] || [[word:shushavah|shushavah]] || [[word:kushavah|kushavah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushavah|thushavah]] || [[word:jushavah|jushavah]] || [[word:shushavah|shushavah]] || [[word:kushavah|kushavah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshavah|theshavah]] || [[word:jeshavah|jeshavah]] || [[word:sheshavah|sheshavah]] || [[word:keshavah|keshavah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshavah|thothoshavah]] || [[word:jojoshavah|jojoshavah]] || [[word:shoshoshavah|shoshoshavah]] || [[word:kokoshavah|kokoshavah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshavah|thoshavah]] || [[word:joshavah|joshavah]] || [[word:shoshavah|shoshavah]] || [[word:koshavah|koshavah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshavah|thoshavah]] || [[word:joshavah|joshavah]] || [[word:shoshavah|shoshavah]] || [[word:koshavah|koshavah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshavah|thĂŠshavah]] || [[word:jĂŠshavah|jĂŠshavah]] || [[word:shĂŠshavah|shĂŠshavah]] || [[word:kĂŠshavah|kĂŠshavah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashavah|thathashavah]] || [[word:jajashavah|jajashavah]] || [[word:shashashavah|shashashavah]] || [[word:kakashavah|kakashavah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashavah|thashavah]] || [[word:jashavah|jashavah]] || [[word:shashavah|shashavah]] || [[word:kashavah|kashavah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashavah|thashavah]] || [[word:jashavah|jashavah]] || [[word:shashavah|shashavah]] || [[word:kashavah|kashavah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashavah|shashavah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashavah|goshashavah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashavah|gokishashavah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashavahnĂŒ|shashavahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashavahnknĂŒ|goshashavahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashavahnĂŒ|gokishashavahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashavahshĂ«|shashavahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashavahnkshĂ«|goshashavahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashavahshĂ«|gokishashavahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashavahro|shashavahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashavahnkro|goshashavahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashavahro|gokishashavahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashavahmu|shashavahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashavahnkmu|goshashavahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashavahmu|gokishashavahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashavahsher|shashavahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashavahnksher|goshashavahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashavahsher|gokishashavahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashavahng|shashavahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashavahnkng|goshashavahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashavahng|gokishashavahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashavahya|shashavahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashavahnkya|goshashavahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashavahya|gokishashavahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashavahyam|shashavahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashavahnkyam|goshashavahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashavahyam|gokishashavahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashavahnĂŒshĂ«|shashavahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashavahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashavahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashavahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashavahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashavahnĂŒro|shashavahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashavahnknĂŒro|goshashavahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashavahnĂŒro|gokishashavahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashavahnĂŒmu|shashavahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashavahnknĂŒmu|goshashavahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashavahnĂŒmu|gokishashavahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashavahshĂ«nĂŒ|shashavahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashavahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashavahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashavahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashavahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashavahshĂ«ro|shashavahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashavahnkshĂ«ro|goshashavahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashavahshĂ«ro|gokishashavahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashavahshĂ«mu|shashavahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashavahnkshĂ«mu|goshashavahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashavahshĂ«mu|gokishashavahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashavahronĂŒ|shashavahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashavahnkronĂŒ|goshashavahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashavahronĂŒ|gokishashavahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashavahroshĂ«|shashavahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashavahnkroshĂ«|goshashavahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashavahroshĂ«|gokishashavahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashavahromu|shashavahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashavahnkromu|goshashavahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashavahromu|gokishashavahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashavahmunĂŒ|shashavahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashavahnkmunĂŒ|goshashavahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashavahmunĂŒ|gokishashavahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashavahmushĂ«|shashavahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashavahnkmushĂ«|goshashavahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashavahmushĂ«|gokishashavahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashavahmuro|shashavahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashavahnkmuro|goshashavahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashavahmuro|gokishashavahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
